name: Pumpkin Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Place whole Graham Crackers in a 13 X 9-inch pan.
2. Melt the Diet Margarine and brush over the crackers.
3. In a bowl, beat the Cream Cheese with an electric mixer until smooth.
4. Mix the spices (cinnamon, cloves, allspice, nutmeg) with the Pumpkin in a separate bowl.
5. Add the pumpkin mixture to the Cream Cheese.
6. Beat together the Brown Sugar, Skim Milk, and sprinkle in the Instant Pudding mix.
7. Mix in the remaining ingredients until well blended.
8. Gently fold in the Cool Whip.
9. Pour the batter over the crackers in the pan and spread evenly.
10. Cover with plastic wrap and refrigerate overnight.
